yesterday.summary: Fixed login page performance issue and reviewed CSV export spec
yesterday.raw: Yesterday I was working on SCRUM-162, the login page performance issue. Got the database connection pooling sorted out and the response time dropped from around 3 seconds to under 500 milliseconds. Also reviewed the CSV export spec with the team.

today.raw: Today I'm picking up SCRUM-175, the dashboard data accuracy issues Vanshita flagged. Going to trace the aggregation query first and see where the numbers are diverging.

blockers.raw: One blocker - I need staging DB access to reproduce the dashboard issue. Filed a ticket with DevOps yesterday but still waiting.
items: Waiting on staging DB access from DevOps

one_line_summary: Fixed SCRUM-162 login performance yesterday, starting SCRUM-175 dashboard fix today - blocked on staging DB access.

yesterday.summary: Completed login UI fixes and filed dashboard layout issues
yesterday.raw: Yesterday I wrapped up SCRUM-28, the login page UI fixes - all the styling issues are resolved and merged. Also went through the dashboard and filed three new tickets for the layout problems I noticed.

today.raw: Today I'm picking up SCRUM-34, the dashboard component refactor. Planning to break it into smaller subcomponents so the layout issues I flagged yesterday are easier to fix.

blockers.raw: No blockers today, everything is on track.

one_line_summary: Finished SCRUM-28 login UI yesterday, starting SCRUM-34 dashboard refactor today - no blockers.

yesterday.summary: Reviewed architecture for payment API improvements
yesterday.raw: Yesterday I spent most of the day reviewing the architecture for the payment API improvements. Had a few sync calls with the team and documented the current bottlenecks.

today.summary: Finalizing payment API design and onboarding new hire
today.raw: Today I'm finalizing the design document for the payment API work and also doing an onboarding session with the new backend hire in the afternoon.

one_line_summary: Reviewed payment API architecture yesterday, finalizing design today and onboarding new hire - no blockers.

yesterday.raw: Yesterday I spent the day digging into SCRUM-162. Found that the login page slowness was coming from an unindexed user lookup query. Started prototyping the connection pool change.

today.summary: Implementing connection pooling fix for SCRUM-162
today.raw: Today I'm implementing the connection pooling fix. Should have it in a PR by end of day.

one_line_summary: Investigated SCRUM-162 root cause yesterday, implementing fix today - no blockers.

yesterday.summary: Worked on SCRUM-28 login page UI fixes
yesterday.raw: Yesterday I was working on SCRUM-28, the login page UI fixes. Got the form validation styling consistent across browsers but still had a few edge cases on mobile.

today.summary: Wrapping up SCRUM-28 mobile edge cases
today.raw: Today I want to finish the mobile edge cases on SCRUM-28 and get the PR reviewed.

one_line_summary: Worked on SCRUM-28 UI fixes yesterday, wrapping up mobile edge cases today - no blockers.

yesterday.summary: Triaged support tickets and fixed chatbot crash
yesterday.raw: Yesterday I triaged the incoming support tickets from the weekend and fixed the chatbot crash that SCRUM-89 was blocking users on.

today.raw: Today I'm starting on SCRUM-162, the login page performance issue. Going to profile the request path first to figure out where the time is going.

one_line_summary: Fixed SCRUM-89 chatbot crash yesterday, starting SCRUM-162 login performance today - no blockers.
